responseText:
# 10-Day Rivian Activity Summary: Feb 27 – Mar 8, 2026

## Overview
Your Rivian "ToughNut" was quite busy over this 10-day stretch:
- **74 trips** covering **1,078 miles**
- **~25 hours** of driving time
- **17 charging sessions** adding **670 kWh**
- Average efficiency: **64%**

---

## The Narrative: A Vermont Ski Trip & Return

### **Friday, Feb 27 – The Journey North Begins**
The period kicked off with local errands around Cornwall, CT in the morning. By afternoon, you embarked on a significant drive—**94 miles from Cornwall to Bennington, VT**, arriving with 28% battery after a 2-hour journey. A quick DC fast charge in Bennington (+28 kWh, $16.89) topped you up before pushing another **58 miles to Ludlow, VT**, arriving at 25% just before 9 PM. You plugged in overnight at a slow L2 charger in Plymouth, VT.

### **Saturday–Sunday, Feb 28–Mar 1 – Vermont Ski Days**
Saturday was spent skiing or enjoying the Ludlow area—short local drives to the mountain and back. You charged overnight at Ludlow, adding 54 kWh. 

Sunday afternoon brought the **longest leg of the trip: 123 miles from Ludlow, VT back toward Connecticut**, but you only made it to Canaan, CT with **17% battery** remaining. An emergency DC fast charge at North Canaan ($17.73) got you to 34%, then you limped the final 17 miles home to Cornwall, arriving at 19%. You finished charging overnight at home.

### **Monday–Tuesday, Mar 2–3 – Back to Vermont!**
Apparently one trip wasn't enough. Monday morning, you drove **34 miles to Egremont, MA**, then continued **72 miles to Dover, VT** (arriving with just 23% battery). You charged overnight at Dover, adding 78 kWh.

Tuesday was busy: local Dover errands, then a **54-mile drive to West Lebanon, NH** where you DC fast charged (+58 kWh), followed by a **77-mile push to Stowe, VT**, arriving with 38% battery.

### **Wednesday, Mar 4 – The Return South**
A marathon travel day. Morning local drives in Stowe, then you headed south through Waterbury and Montpelier, stopping for a DC fast charge in Montpelier (+45 kWh). From there, you drove to Lebanon, NH for another fast charge (+63 kWh), then made the long **114-mile haul to Holyoke, MA**—the longest single drive of the period—arriving with just **20% battery**. A final fast charge in Holyoke (+79 kWh) got you topped off before heading to Springfield for the night.

### **Thursday, Mar 5 – Homeward Bound**
A 13-mile morning drive from Springfield to Windsor Locks, then **52 miles to Torrington, CT** and local errands there. Finally, you returned to Cornwall—**17 miles**—and spent the evening charging at home (+31 kWh overnight).

### **Friday–Saturday, Mar 6–8 – Local CT Driving**
Back to routine. Local Cornwall drives on Friday, including a trip to Torrington. Saturday was more local errands around Cornwall and Sharon. Sunday (Mar 8) saw several trips between Cornwall, Sharon, and Litchfield—ending the period with the Rivian at **18% battery** after a final drive to Cornwall.

---

## Charging Breakdown
| Type | Sessions | Energy | Key Locations |
|------|----------|--------|---------------|
| **DC Fast Charging** | 5 | ~270 kWh | Bennington VT, West Lebanon NH, Montpelier VT, Holyoke MA, North Canaan CT |
| **L2 Home/Destination** | 12 | ~400 kWh | Cornwall CT (home base), Ludlow VT, Dover VT, Plymouth VT |

**Total charging cost: ~$52** (mostly from the two expensive DC fast charges at $17.73 and $16.89)

---

## Notable Observations
1. **Two distinct Vermont trips** in one week—one ending Feb 29, another starting Mar 2
2. **Range anxiety moment:** Arriving in Canaan CT at 17% on Mar 1, requiring an emergency fast charge
3. **Heaviest travel days:** Mar 4 (114 miles) and Mar 1 (123 miles)
4. **Efficiency suffered** on short local trips (often 20-40%), while highway cruising hit 70-90%
5. **Home base** is clearly Cornwall, CT—you returned there multiple times and did most L2 charging there
